templateOne.name: Template One
templateOne.useCase: Single-image social post with a strong headline and short supporting line.
templateOne.geminiPrompt: Rewrite the single-card social post in a more punchy, publishable way. Keep the title to a maximum of 3 words. Keep the subtitle to 100 characters or less. Use only facts from the news text. Make it suitable for a single-image social post. No CTA needed.

templateTwo.name: Template Two
templateTwo.subtitleRule: Short supporting line, 2 to 4 bullets preferred.
templateTwo.useCase: Quick update or explainer card with concise bullet points.
templateTwo.geminiPrompt: Rewrite this card as a concise bullet-based social brief. Keep it factual, short, and easy to scan.

templateThree.name: Template Three
templateThree.useCase: Carousel cover, story opener, or chapter title slide.
templateThree.geminiPrompt: Rewrite this as a clean cover slide. Keep the title short and give it a strong opener feel.
